title: Care for health and welfare of pigs
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Care for health and welfare of pigs demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Monitor pig environment

pcs.text: Identify and follow biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a pork production site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and follow biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a pork production site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and follow biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a pork production site.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards, and assess risks and control risks prior to commencing monitoring tasks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards, and assess risks and control risks prior to commencing monitoring tasks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards, and assess risks and control risks prior to commencing monitoring tasks.

pcs.text: Select, prepare and fit appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) required for monitoring tasks and conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, prepare and fit appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) required for monitoring tasks and conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, prepare and fit appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) required for monitoring tasks and conditions.

pcs.text: Check and/or adjust pig accommodation and/or enclosures to meet individual animal health and welfare requirements according to enterprise procedures, including safety and security
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and/or adjust pig accommodation and/or enclosures to meet individual animal health and welfare requirements according to enterprise procedures, including safety and security?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and/or adjust pig accommodation and/or enclosures to meet individual animal health and welfare requirements according to enterprise procedures, including safety and security.

pcs.text: Check and/or adjust temperature, ventilation, humidity and other environmental control equipment to meet pig needs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and/or adjust temperature, ventilation, humidity and other environmental control equipment to meet pig needs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and/or adjust temperature, ventilation, humidity and other environmental control equipment to meet pig needs.

pcs.text: Check and/or adjust pig feeders and drinkers according to enterprise schedule
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and/or adjust pig feeders and drinkers according to enterprise schedule?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and/or adjust pig feeders and drinkers according to enterprise schedule.

pcs.text: Check for signs of pests and/or predators according to enterprise procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check for signs of pests and/or predators according to enterprise procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check for signs of pests and/or predators according to enterprise procedures.

pcs.text: Record and report issues according to enterprise requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and report issues according to enterprise requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and report issues according to enterprise requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Monitor pig environment

elements.title: Maintain hygiene

pcs.text: Identify work areas, surfaces and equipment to be cleaned and/or disinfected
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify work areas, surfaces and equipment to be cleaned and/or disinfected?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify work areas, surfaces and equipment to be cleaned and/or disinfected.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards, and assess risks and control risks prior to commencing hygiene tasks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards, and assess risks and control risks prior to commencing hygiene tasks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards, and assess risks and control risks prior to commencing hygiene tasks.

pcs.text: Select and fit appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) required for hygiene tasks and conditions

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and fit appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) required for hygiene tasks and conditions.

pcs.text: Clean and/or disinfect work areas, equipment and surfaces according to enterprise health, safety, personal hygiene and biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and/or disinfect work areas, equipment and surfaces according to enterprise health, safety, personal hygiene and biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and/or disinfect work areas, equipment and surfaces according to enterprise health, safety, personal hygiene and biosecurity procedures.

pcs.text: Dispose of waste according to enterprise environmental and biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dispose of waste according to enterprise environmental and biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of waste according to enterprise environmental and biosecurity procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Maintain hygiene

elements.title: Carry out routine pig health checks

pcs.text: Confirm pig identification and determine vaccine, medication or other treatment requirements according to enterprise health plan

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and fit appropriate PPE required for treatment tasks and conditions.

pcs.text: Provide routine vaccines, medications or other treatments to pigs using safe and low stress techniques according to enterprise requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide routine vaccines, medications or other treatments to pigs using safe and low stress techniques according to enterprise requirements.
